requirement_topic.en: LEC Grid Connection — 220/380 V 50 Hz Match and Project Approval
requirement_topic.zh: LEC并网接入——220/380 V 50 Hz一致性与项目审批
requirement_topic.zht: LEC併網接入——220/380 V 50 Hz一致性與項目審批

summary.en: Lesotho's distribution supply is commonly referenced as 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz, served by Lesotho Electricity Company (LEC). This genuinely matches China's nominal 220/380 V 50 Hz domestic charger baseline. Grid-connected charger installations still require project-level review by LEC and, where commercial electricity service or regulated energy activity is involved, Lesotho Electricity and Water Authority (LEWA) oversight. Lesotho is a landlocked enclave within South Africa, imports most of its electricity through South African interconnections with Eskom, and supplements supply with Muela hydro. South-African NRS-style interconnection practice and local LEC requirements are therefore likely to influence project specifications, even where Lesotho-specific EVSE rules are not yet published.
summary.zh: 莱索托配电供电通常为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz，由莱索托电力公司（LEC）供电。这与中国国内充电桩220/380 V 50 Hz标称基线真正一致。并网充电桩安装仍须接受LEC项目级审查；涉及商业供电服务或受监管能源活动时，还须接受莱索托电力和水务管理局（LEWA）监管。莱索托是被南非包围的内陆国家，大部分电力通过与南非Eskom的互联进口，并由Muela水电补充。因此，即使莱索托尚未发布EVSE专项规则，南非NRS式并网实践和LEC本地要求也很可能影响项目规范。
summary.zht: 賴索托配電供電通常為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz，由賴索托電力公司（LEC）供電。這與中國國內充電樁220/380 V 50 Hz標稱基線真正一致。併網充電樁安裝仍須接受LEC項目級審查；涉及商業供電服務或受監管能源活動時，還須接受賴索托電力和水務管理局（LEWA）監管。賴索托是被南非包圍的內陸國家，大部分電力通過與南非Eskom的互聯進口，並由Muela水電補充。因此，即使賴索托尚未發布EVSE專項規則，南非NRS式併網實踐和LEC本地要求也很可能影響項目規範。

standards_or_laws: LEC (Lesotho Electricity Company) — grid connection, metering, and supply-capacity review
LEWA (Lesotho Electricity and Water Authority) — electricity-sector licensing and regulation
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality at point of common coupling
South African NRS interconnection practice — likely regional reference for grid-connected equipment

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are accepted under GB/T 18487.1-2023 design evidence, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 communication for DC systems, and local grid-operator project acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. Unlike many export markets, Lesotho's nominal voltage and frequency match China's nominal baseline, but China grid-operator acceptance documents are not LEC or LEWA approvals and do not address Lesotho site capacity, imported-supply constraints, or regional interconnection practice.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装依据GB/T 18487.1-2023设计证据、GB/T 20234接口、直流系统GB/T 27930-2023通信，以及当地电网运营商项目验收。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。不同于许多出口市场，莱索托标称电压和频率与中国标称基线一致，但中国电网运营商验收文件不是LEC或LEWA批准，也不覆盖莱索托站点容量、进口电力约束或区域并网实践。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝依據GB/T 18487.1-2023設計證據、GB/T 20234接口、直流系統GB/T 27930-2023通訊，以及當地電網運營商項目驗收。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。不同於許多出口市場，賴索托標稱電壓和頻率與中國標稱基線一致，但中國電網運營商驗收文件不是LEC或LEWA批准，也不覆蓋賴索托站點容量、進口電力約束或區域併網實踐。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters and project developers should confirm: (1) LEC supply capacity, metering, protection, and commissioning requirements for the specific site; (2) whether LEWA licensing or approval is triggered by public, paid, or fleet charging operations; (3) harmonic and power-quality evidence under IEC 61000; (4) compatibility with any South-African NRS-derived interconnection requirements written into the project; (5) voltage tolerance and surge protection for a smaller, import-dependent grid. The nominal 220/380 V 50 Hz match reduces the voltage-conversion gap but does not remove LEC, LEWA, or site-engineering approval.
gap.zh: 出口商和项目开发商应确认：(1) 具体站点的LEC供电容量、计量、保护和调试要求；(2) 公共、付费或车队充电运营是否触发LEWA许可证或审批；(3) IEC 61000项下的谐波和电能质量证据；(4) 项目文件中是否写入源自南非NRS的并网要求；(5) 面向较小且依赖进口电力电网的电压容差和浪涌保护。220/380 V 50 Hz标称一致性降低了电压转换差距，但不免除LEC、LEWA或站点工程审批。
gap.zht: 出口商和項目開發商應確認：(1) 具體站點的LEC供電容量、計量、保護和調試要求；(2) 公共、付費或車隊充電運營是否觸發LEWA許可證或審批；(3) IEC 61000項下的諧波和電能質量證據；(4) 項目文件中是否寫入源自南非NRS的併網要求；(5) 面向較小且依賴進口電力電網的電壓容差和浪湧保護。220/380 V 50 Hz標稱一致性降低了電壓轉換差距，但不免除LEC、LEWA或站點工程審批。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — LEC connection approval is required for grid-connected installations; LEWA licensing or approval may be mandatory for commercial electricity service or public charging operations; nominal voltage and frequency match China but site approval remains required
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically only and is not an LEC or LEWA approval substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Lesotho's 220/380 V 50 Hz grid genuinely matches China's nominal charger voltage and frequency baseline. The remaining gate is not voltage conversion but LEC connection approval, LEWA regulatory review where applicable, IEC power-quality evidence, and site-specific capacity assessment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 莱索托220/380 V 50 Hz电网与中国充电桩标称电压和频率基线真正一致。剩余门槛不是电压转换，而是LEC并网批准、适用时的LEWA监管审查、IEC电能质量证据和站点容量评估。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 賴索托220/380 V 50 Hz電網與中國充電樁標稱電壓和頻率基線真正一致。剩餘門檻不是電壓轉換，而是LEC併網批准、適用時的LEWA監管審查、IEC電能質量證據和站點容量評估。
